hero.quote: I'm a CPA & digital creator with a passion for numbers and operational efficiency.
hero.mission: My mission is to support people and creativity by delivering financial clarity and operational flow, without getting in the way of the magic.

humanise.title: Assistant Financial Controller
bullets: Right hand to financial management for an 8-agency marketing communications group; consolidated monthly reporting and budget variance analysis.
Automation of reports and management tools via PowerQuery and Google Apps Script/Macros.
Supervision of AP/AR, treasury, inter-company billing, and fee invoicing. Technical env: NetSuite, Excel (PowerQuery), Google Suite.

signe_local.title: Chief Accountant
bullets: Financial oversight for 4 physical stores and an eCommerce platform.
Regular monitoring of inventory, financial forecasting, and reconciliation of funds.
Process improvements to maintain operational efficiency and support strategic growth.

belvoir.title: Financial Controller
bullets: Bookkeeping, financial transaction recording, and reconciliation.
Budgeting and forecasting processes; financial projections to support company growth.
Tax planning: identifying opportunities for savings and ensuring compliance with local regulations.

renovco.title: Project Accountant
bullets: Project-based accounting support for restoration and renovation initiatives.
Follow-ups with project managers to ensure alignment with budgets and cost tracking.

elections_canada.title: Central Poll Supervisor
bullets: Ongoing civic mandate; leads teams of 8 as polling supervisor for federal and provincial elections.
Appointed supervisor after proving as clerk and Deputy Returning Officer.
Ensures confidentiality of the vote and compliance with electoral law.

costco.title: Customer Service & Sales
bullets: Featured on Membership dept. Top Employees board for credit card and membership conversion performance.
Repeatedly selected to drive new memberships over standard cashier duties.

public_outreach.title: Fundraiser
bullets: Door-to-door recurring donation campaigns for Doctors Without Borders, Greenpeace, UNICEF, Amnesty International, and CARE.
Developed key communication and persuasion skills through representing world-leading NGOs.

sherbrooke.credential: DESS — Specialized Graduate Diploma in Accounting

hec.notes: Major: Accounting. Trilingual program (FR / EN / ES).

jean_giono.institution: Jean Giono Intl. School of Turin
jean_giono.notes: Math specialization. Grade: 18.67/20 (≈ 4.3 GPA). Trilingual (FR/EN/ES). Student rep on Board of Directors (2016–17); VP of CVL committee (2014–16).

qcheck.title: Q-Check
qcheck.description: A digital coat-check solution focused on payment simplicity and operational flow for busy event venues. Reimagining the coat-check experience end-to-end — from QR-based ticketing to seamless payments.

moretti_radio.title: Moretti Radio
moretti_radio.description: Episodic DJ mix series under the alias Chill Will. Afro-Balearic Chic — blending Afro House, Nu-Disco, French Touch and Melodic Electronic for corporate events and restaurant residencies. Sophisticated frictionless listening.

dj.title: DJ Chill Will
dj.body: Outside of finance, I perform as DJ Chill Will for corporate events and restaurant residencies. Host of Moretti Radio — Afro-Balearic Chic, sophisticated frictionless listening.

wellness.title: Discipline & Wellness
wellness.body: I start every day at 6 a.m. with meditation and cold exposure. Yoga and strength training keep me focused and energized. Competed in the 24h Tremblant endurance event for children's foundations.

poetry.title: Prix Poésie en Liberté — 2nd Prize
poetry.body: 2nd prize in the Prix Poésie en Liberté (Nov 2016) — an international French-language poetry competition run under the French Ministry of National Education, with 100,000+ entries annually from ages 15–25 across all countries.

global.title: Global Perspective
global.body: Quadrilingual (FR/EN/ES/IT), EU citizen, family ties in Switzerland. Studied in Turin, Montreal, and Madrid. Open to professional exchanges within the Swiss and European market.

contact.intro: Whether it's a professional opportunity, a collaboration, or just a conversation — I'd love to hear from you.

form.placeholder_message: Tell me what's on your mind...
form.msg_success: Message sent! I'll get back to you soon.

sidebar.heading: Direct Contact
sidebar.location: Montréal, Québec, Canada · Open to Swiss/EU market

pdf.headline: CPA · Assistant Financial Controller
pdf.profile_quote: "I'm a CPA and Assistant Financial Controller who operates at the intersection of accounting and systems architecture. My north is the total obliteration of legacy manual workflows."
pdf.profile_sub: William Seguin translates fluently between IT (JSON) and finance (GAAP), and believes removing tedious manual work is a prerequisite for strong company culture. Holding EU citizenship and family ties in Switzerland, he maintains a natural connection to the Swiss and European market.

skills.systems_body: Microsoft Power Query · Google Apps Script · NetSuite · Microsoft Excel
skills.accounting_body: Multi-entity accounting · Variance analysis · Financial reporting · Tax compliance · Budget preparation · Treasury management
skills.process_body: Process automation · Process modeling · Strategic planning · Project management

achievements.poetry_body: International French-language poetry competition (Nov 2016), French Ministry of Education. 100,000+ entries from ages 15-25 across all countries.
achievements.cpa_body: Certified Public Accountant designation, CPA Quebec.
